description: A battery storage asset operator needs to submit bids into the day-ahead market for ancillary services (frequency regulation).

nodes.task_description: Analyze historical clearing prices for frequency regulation services in the target market.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies price patterns, such as higher prices during morning and evening ramps.

nodes.task_description: Determine the battery's available capacity for regulation up/down, considering its current state of charge and any energy arbitrage commitments.

expected_outcome.value: Agent calculates the MW capacity available for bidding in each hour.

nodes.task_description: Formulate and submit hourly bids into the ancillary service market based on price forecasts and opportunity cost.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully submits a set of competitive bids.
